meta.description: Smell index for Vue 3. Maps to rubric.json rule_ref.

smells.name: Unsafe v-html
smells.summary: v-html bound to user or remote content without sanitisation.

smells.name: Destructured reactive
smells.summary: Props or reactive object destructured, losing reactivity.

smells.name: Prop mutation
smells.summary: Child component mutates a prop directly.

smells.name: Uncleaned effect
smells.summary: Timer or listener without onBeforeUnmount cleanup.

smells.name: Undeclared emits
smells.summary: Component uses emit without defineEmits contract.

smells.name: Deep watcher
smells.summary: Deep watch on large reactive trees.

smells.name: Complex template expression
smells.summary: Heavy logic embedded in mustache or directive.

smells.name: Div as button
smells.summary: Click handler on non-interactive element without a11y support.

smells.name: Positive: typed props
smells.summary: defineProps with type or validator schema.

smells.name: Store for local state
smells.summary: Pinia/Vuex used for state owned by one view.
